name: apis.io agent skills
description: Skills for discovering and consuming APIs in the apis.io federated catalog.

skills.name: discover-apis-io
skills.description: Discover the structure of the apis.io network — its subdomains, machine-readable catalogs, and content-negotiation conventions — so other skills can find APIs efficiently.

skills.name: search-apis
skills.description: Find APIs in the apis.io catalog by keyword, capability, tag, or provider.

skills.name: fetch-api-spec
skills.description: Given an apis.io API URL or catalog entry, fetch the OpenAPI / AsyncAPI / Postman specification for that API.
